RAJA B. EL-QUARE IN PRO PER VS. KARA MENGHINI; IN PRO PER MARK PLAZA; IN PRO PER 10:20 A.M. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY JUDGE ORR. DIANA PADILLA REPORTER. STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS KARA MENGHINI AND MARK PLAZA FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 1294 6TH AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO CA 94122 AND FOR MONEY JUDGMENT OF $175.00 TO BE PAID BY 10/9/93 AND FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY EXECUTION ON THE JUDGMENT TO 10/10/93, PROVIDED THAT MONEY IN THE SUM OF $175.00 IS PAID BY 10/9/93 BY CASHIERS CHECK, MONEY ORDER,OR CASH. EACH SIDE BEARS ITS OWN COST AND ATTORNEY FEES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENCHNI, KARA PLAZA, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1294 6TH AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94122 $175.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175.00, STAYED UNTIL OCT-10-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 10/10/93. PAYMENT OF THE MONEY JUDGMENT TO BE MADE BY CASHIERS CHECK, MONEY ORDER OR CASH. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COST.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SERVICE FEE STORAGE FEE FOR CASE NUMBER 093436. FILED BY PLAINTIFF EL-QARE, RAJA B.
